x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Agile team and story data enables Now Assist SPM to provide AI velocity prediction and capacity planning for agile portfolios.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure agile teams and populate sprint and story data. Target: 50+ active user stories and 5+ active sprints. Now Assist SPM uses velocity and sprint data for AI capacity planning recommendations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0c
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Agile team and story data enables Now Assist SPM to provide AI velocity prediction and capacity planning for agile portfolios.]]></ai_justification><check_name>SPM Agile Team Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // rm_story = user stories (OOB SPM agile table)
    // rm_scrum_task = tasks within stories — not the right grain for this check
    var gaStories = new GlideAggregate('rm_story');
    gaStories.addQuery('active', true);
    gaStories.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaStories.query();
    var stories = gaStories.next() ? parseInt(gaStories.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaSprints = new GlideAggregate('rm_sprint');
    gaSprints.addQuery('active', true);
    gaSprints.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaSprints.query();
    var sprints = gaSprints.next() ? parseInt(gaSprints.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = stories + ' active stories | ' + sprints + ' active sprints';

    if (stories >= 50 && sprints >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: stories + ' active stories and ' + sprints + ' active sprints. Now Assist SPM has sufficient agile data for AI velocity prediction and capacity planning.'
        };
    } else if (stories >= 20 || sprints >= 2) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Partial agile data (' + stories + ' stories, ' + sprints + ' sprints). Targets: 50+ stories, 5+ sprints. Now Assist SPM velocity prediction will have reduced accuracy.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Insufficient agile data (' + stories + ' stories, ' + sprints + ' sprints). Now Assist SPM uses velocity data for AI capacity planning — insufficient data for meaningful recommendations.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SPM</module><number>CHK0000478</number><order>120</order><remediation_guidance>Configure agile teams and populate sprint and story data. Target: 50+ active user stories and 5+ active sprints. Now Assist SPM uses velocity and sprint data for AI capacity planning recommendations.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>8bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0c</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>SPM Agile Team Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_8bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0c</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
